summary: Security review of CLI AI DX optimization (schema templates, validation hints, envelope auto-injection). No exploitable vulnerabilities found. Trust boundaries properly maintained: evidence command excluded from envelope injection, identifiers validated against safe regex, prototype pollution keys blocked, no command injection surfaces (no exec/spawn/eval), schema template generation is pure data transformation with bounded recursion (MAX_DEPTH=10). All user input flows through JSON.parse or regex-validated identifiers before reaching filesystem operations.
